---
name: New performance problem
about: Suggest a new React performance exercise
labels: new problem
---

## The problem

What React performance issue does this exercise cover?

## The analogy

How would you explain this to someone who doesn't know React?
(Can be Pokémon, cooking, sports, movies anything that makes it click)

## The fix

What is the correct solution? (e.g. `useMemo`, `useCallback`, `React.memo`...)

## References

Any articles, docs or videos that explain this well?
